# Capture both phases of the live-indicator blink.
# The demo fixture seeds feat/auth with a Live session, so the row's ●
# glyph should be bright (on-phase) shortly after startup and dim
# (off-phase) one blinkInterval later. The two captures must differ in
# raw form at the live-glyph column.
#
# Timing-sensitive — this script is for the agent loop, not CI. Use
# capture-png to eyeball brightness in a real PNG when bisecting style
# regressions.
width 220
height 40
wait 100ms
capture /tmp/canopy-blink-phase-1.txt
wait 1100ms
capture /tmp/canopy-blink-phase-2.txt
